ksa_text: Knowledge of cloud platform services for data and AI workloads across major providers, including compute, storage, managed database, analytics, and machine learning services, with understanding of cloud-native vs cloud-agnostic trade-offs.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Technical Foundations KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.384) to justify inclusion for the AI CoE Leader. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world AI CoE Leader roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Technical Foundations is not a standard competency expectation for AI CoE Leader. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the AI CoE Leader competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.384) and edge-domain placement (Technical Foundations) do not meet inclusion threshold for the AI CoE Leader. All passes support exclusion.
